rules.rule_text:
title: New workstation created using sam-the-admin
id: 8f383fe8-689f-4896-a06a-6631a2c62e0b
status: stable
description: Detects workstation name likely created by exploit utilizing CVE-2021-42278
  and CVE-2021-42287
author: NTT Security - Robin Hellsten
date: 2021-12-17
references:
- https://github.com/WazeHell/sam-the-admin/blob/main/sam_the_admin.py#L30
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: computer_creation
detection:
  newName:
    computer_name|contains: SAMTHEADMIN
  condition: newName
falsepositives:
- No known cases of false positives
level: high
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
